name: Tacos in Pasta Shells
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook, rinse and drain pasta shells.
2. Cut cream cheese into cubes.
3. Cook beef in a large skillet over medium high heat until brown, stirring to separate meat; drain fat.
4. Reduce heat to medium low.
5. Add cream cheese, salt, and chili powder; simmer 5 minutes.
6. Toss shells with butter.
7. Fill each shell with the beef mixture.
8. Arrange shells in a buttered 13x9" pan.
9. Pour taco sauce over each shell.
10. Cover with foil.
11. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 15 minutes.
12. Uncover; top with cheddar cheese, Monterey jack cheese, and chips.
13. Bake for an additional 15 minutes or until bubbly.
14. Top with sour cream and onions.
15. Garnish with lettuce.
